response.justification: Bogdan Szabo does not meet the core technical requirements for this role. While he has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, his resume lacks evidence of C programming proficiency, Linux kernel source-code modification, or embedded networking experience. Additionally, his work history does not demonstrate involvement in security technologies (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X), network switch operations, or embedded system development, which are critical for this position. His strengths lie in web and high-level application development, not the low-level embedded security and networking required here.
strengths: Strong software development background with experience in multiple languages (C++, D, JavaScript, Python)
Proven ability to lead and contribute to open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective)
Experience with system-level programming and performance optimization in high-throughput environments
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C programming for embedded/UNIX development, which is a core requirement
Lacks evidence of Linux kernel source-code modification or embedded system development
No exposure to security technologies (encryption, key exchange, authentication) or networking switch operations
